response.overview: No artist has captured the heartbeat and spirit of New Orleans like James Michalopoulos. This documentary traces the evolution of his work from iconic architectural paintings and celebrated portraiture to luminous French landscapes. From street artist to New Orleans icon, his rise in the 1990's led to international acclaim, yet he chose to root himself in America's last bastion of Bohemia.
response.title: Michalopoulos - The Art of Celebration
